response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure at top-tier companies like Google and Meta. He possesses highly relevant recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP servers, and agentic workflows. However, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions, and lacks explicit experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Staff-level engineering experience at major tech companies (Google, Meta) with strong architectural and cloud skills.
Direct recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
Deep expertise in TypeScript and modern software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, microservices).
concerns: Does not meet the strict requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions.
Lacks explicit experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
The vast majority of his career has been focused on traditional web, microservices, and GIS development rather than AI/ML.
